description: Style Notefabindia's jewellery references the eras gone by and are reworked to blend in with your season outfits. Whoever told you ethnic jewellery can't be worn with your fashion favourites were wrong! This statement piece from Fabindia is a jewellery box essential that will make an interesting addition to your simpler ensembles.Product DetailsSilver earring with a dangling triangular patternBlue coloured cnetre stoneFish hook closureMaterial and CareSilverWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeLength: 1.5 cm (approximate)
